rdf:Description.dcterms:bibliographicCitation: Illustrated catalogue of gothic and renaissance italian and frech art gathered by chevalier Raoul Tolentino, expert antiquarian of Rome, catalogo della vendita all'asta American Art Galleries (New York, 22-26 aprile 1924)., New York 1924.
rdf:Description.dcterms:title: Illustrated catalogue of gothic and renaissance italian and frech art gathered by chevalier Raoul Tolentino, expert antiquarian of Rome, catalogo della vendita all'asta American Art Galleries (New York, 22-26 aprile 1924).
